name: swiss-blade
description: Open-source Swiss Blade Chrome extension for ad blocking, screenshots, and site storage inspection.

scripts.build: npm run build:extension-scripts && next build && node scripts/externalize-inline-scripts.mjs
scripts.package:chrome: npm run build && cd out && zip -r -FS ../swiss-blade-chrome.zip . -x "*.DS_Store" -x "__MACOSX*"
